column1: # US -> British spelling map for scribe --dialect british.
# One pair per line: us<TAB>british (lowercase; case is reproduced at use).
# Covers irregulars the suffix rules (-ize/-ise, -yze/-yse) cannot: -our, -re,
# -ce, doubled -l, -ogue, and one-offs. Ambiguous words whose US spelling is
# also valid British in another sense (program, check, tire, curb, story,
# license-as-verb, practice-as-verb) are deliberately left out.
